title: mimulus guttatus var. moschatus
intro: Mimulus guttatus var. moschatus, also known as sweet scented monkey flower, is a variety of the yellow monkey flower plant that is native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The plant has been used to promote overall health and well-being, and its health benefits include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Mimulus guttatus var. moschatus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and reduce inflammation.
